```text
    10→export const PostOutdate = () => {
    11→  const t = useTranslations('post')
    12→  const time = useCurrentPostDataSelector((s) => s?.modified)
    13→  if (!time) {
    14→    return null
    15→  }
    16→  return dayjs().diff(dayjs(time), 'day') > 60 ? (
    17→    <Banner className="my-10" type="warning">
    18→      <span className="leading-[1.8]">
    19→        {t('outdated_prefix')}
    20→        <RelativeTime date={time} />
    21→        {t('outdated_suffix')}
    22→      </span>
    23→    </Banner>
    24→  ) : null
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/note/NoteHideIfSecret.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import dayjs from 'dayjs'
     4→import { useLocale, useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     5→import { useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     8→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
     9→import { useCurrentNoteDataSelector } from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
    10→
    11→export const NoteHideIfSecret: Component = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const t = useTranslations('note')
    13→  const tCommon = useTranslations('common')
    14→  const locale = useLocale()
    15→  const noteSecret = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.publicAt)
    16→
    17→  const noteId = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.nid)
    18→  const secretDate = useMemo(() => new Date(noteSecret!), [noteSecret])
    19→  const isSecret = noteSecret ? dayjs(noteSecret).isAfter(new Date()) : false
    20→
    21→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    22→
    23→  useEffect(() => {
    24→    if (!noteId) return
    25→    let timer: any
    26→    const timeout = +secretDate - Date.now()
    27→    // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/3468607/why-does-settimeout-break-for-large-millisecond-delay-values
    28→    const MAX_TIMEOUT = (2 ^ 31) - 1
    29→    if (isSecret && timeout && timeout < MAX_TIMEOUT) {
    30→      timer = setTimeout(() => {
    31→        toast.info(tCommon('refresh_to_view'), { autoClose: false })
    32→      }, timeout)
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    return () => {
    36→      clearTimeout(timer)
    37→    }
    38→  }, [isSecret, secretDate, noteId])
    39→
    40→  if (!noteId) return null
    41→
    42→  if (isSecret) {
    43→    const localeMap: Record<string, string> = {
    44→      zh: 'zh-cn',
    45→      en: 'en-US',
    46→      ja: 'ja-JP',
    47→    }
    48→    const dateFormat = noteSecret
    49→      ? Intl.DateTimeFormat(localeMap[locale] || locale, {
    50→          hour12: false,
    51→          hour: 'numeric',
    52→          minute: 'numeric',
    53→          year: 'numeric',
    54→          day: 'numeric',
    55→          month: 'long',
    56→        }).format(new Date(noteSecret))
    57→      : ''
    58→
    59→    if (isLogged) {
    60→      return (
    61→        <>
    62→          <div className="my-6 text-center">
    63→            <p>
    64→              {t('secret_prefix')}
    65→              {dateFormat}
    66→              {t('secret_suffix')}
    67→            </p>
    68→            <p>{t('preview_mode')}</p>
    69→          </div>
    70→          {children}
    71→        </>
    72→      )
    73→    }
    74→    return (
    75→      <div className="my-6 text-center">
    76→        {t('secret_prefix')}
    77→        {dateFormat}
    78→        {t('secret_suffix')}
    79→      </div>
    80→    )
    81→  }
    82→  return children
    83→}
    84→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/lib/cookie.ts`

```text
     1→import dayjs from 'dayjs'
     2→import Cookies from 'js-cookie'
     3→
     4→const LikePrefix = 'mx-like'
     5→export function setLikeId(id: string) {
     6→  const has = getLikes()
     7→  if (!has) {
     8→    Cookies.set(LikePrefix, JSON.stringify([id]), { expires: getTomorrow() })
     9→  } else {
    10→    if (isLikedBefore(id)) {
    11→      return
    12→    }
    13→    Cookies.set(
    14→      LikePrefix,
    15→      JSON.stringify((JSON.parse(has) as string[]).concat(id)),
    16→      { expires: getTomorrow() },
    17→    )
    18→  }
    19→}
    20→
    21→function getLikes() {
    22→  return decodeURIComponent(Cookies.get(LikePrefix) ?? '')
    23→}
    24→
    25→export function isLikedBefore(id: string) {
    26→  const has = getLikes()
    27→
    28→  if (!has) {
    29→    return false
    30→  }
    31→  const list = JSON.parse(has) as string[]
    32→
    33→  return list.includes(id)
    34→}
    35→
    36→function getTomorrow() {
    37→  return dayjs().add(1, 'd').set('h', 2).set('m', 0).toDate()
    38→}
    39→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/writing/SidebarDateInputField.tsx`

```text
     1→import dayjs from 'dayjs'
     2→import type { FC } from 'react'
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { Input } from '~/components/ui/input'
     6→import { isValidDate } from '~/lib/datetime'
     7→
     8→export const SidebarDateInputField: FC<{
     9→  label?: string
    10→  getSet: [string | undefined, (value: any) => void]
    11→}> = ({ label, getSet }) => {
    12→  const [created, setCreated] = getSet
    13→
    14→  const [editingCreated, setEditingCreated] = useState(created)
    15→
    16→  const [reset, setReset] = useState(0)
    17→  useEffect(() => {
    18→    if (!created) return
    19→    setEditingCreated(dayjs(created).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss'))
    20→  }, [created, reset])
    21→
    22→  const [hasError, setHasError] = useState(false)
    23→  useEffect(() => {
    24→    if (!editingCreated) return
    25→    if (isValidDate(new Date(editingCreated))) {
    26→      setHasError(false)
    27→    } else setHasError(true)
    28→  }, [editingCreated, setCreated])
    29→
    30→  return (
    31→    <Input
    32→      placeholder={created || ' '}
    33→      value={editingCreated}
    34→      onBlur={() => {
    35→        if (!hasError) {
    36→          setCreated(editingCreated)
    37→        }
    38→      }}
    39→      onChange={(e) => {
    40→        setEditingCreated(e.target.value)
    41→      }}
    42→    />
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    39→
    40→export const config = defineRouteConfig({
    41→  priority: 2,
    42→  title: '编辑',
    43→  icon: <i className="i-mingcute-pen-line" />,
    44→})
    45→export function Component() {
    46→  const [search] = useSearchParams()
    47→  const id = search.get('id')
    48→
    49→  const { data, isLoading, refetch } = useQuery({
    50→    ...adminQueries.post.getPost(id!),
    51→    enabled: !!id,
    52→  })
    53→
    54→  const [key] = useRefetchData(refetch)
    55→
    56→  if (id) {
    57→    if (isLoading) return <PageLoading />
    58→
    59→    return <EditPage initialData={data} key={key} />
    60→  }
    61→  return <EditPage />
    62→}
    63→
    64→const createInitialEditingData = (): PostDto => ({
    65→  title: '',
    66→  allowComment: true,
    67→
    68→  copyright: true,
    69→
    70→  categoryId: '',
    71→  id: '',
    72→  images: [],
    73→
    74→  pin: null,
    75→  pinOrder: 0,
    76→  relatedId: [],
    77→  slug: '',
    78→  tags: [],
    79→  text: '',
    80→  meta: {},
    81→  related: [],
    82→
    83→  summary: '',
    84→})
    85→
    86→const EditPage: FC<{
    87→  initialData?: PostDto
    88→}> = (props) => {
    89→  const [editingData, setEditingData] = useState<PostDto>(() =>
    90→    props.initialData
    91→      ? cloneDeep(props.initialData)
    92→      : createInitialEditingData(),
    93→  )
    94→
    95→  const [forceUpdateKey] = useAutoSaver([editingData, setEditingData])
    96→  const editingAtom = useMemo(() => atom(editingData), [editingData])
    97→  const store = useStore()
    98→  useEffect(
    99→    () =>
   100→      store.sub(editingAtom, () => {
   101→        globalThis.dispatchEvent(new WriteEditEvent(store.get(editingAtom)))
   102→      }),
   103→    [editingAtom, store],
   104→  )
   105→
   106→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   107→  return (
   108→    <PostModelDataAtomProvider key={forceUpdateKey} overrideAtom={editingAtom}>
   109→      <BaseWritingProvider atom={editingAtom}>
   110→        <EditorLayer>
   111→          {isMobile ? (
   112→            <div />
   113→          ) : (
   114→            <span>
   115→              {props.initialData ? <>编辑「{editingData.title}」</> : '撰写'}
   116→            </span>
   117→          )}
   118→          <ActionButtonGroup initialData={props.initialData} />
   119→          <Writing middleSlot={SlugInput} />
   120→          <PostEditorSidebar />
   121→        </EditorLayer>
   122→      </BaseWritingProvider>
   123→    </PostModelDataAtomProvider>
   124→  )
   125→}
   126→
   127→const ActionButtonGroup = ({ initialData }: { initialData?: PostDto }) => {
   128→  const getData = usePostModelGetModelData()
   129→  const setData = usePostModelSetModelData()
   130→  const editorRef = useEditorRef()
   131→  const handleParsed = useEventCallback(
   132→    (data: {
   133→      title?: string | undefined
   134→      text: string
   135→      meta?: Record<string, any> | undefined
   136→    }): void => {
   137→      setData((prev) =>
   138→        produce(prev, (draft) => {
   139→          const nextData = data
   140→          Reflect.deleteProperty(nextData, 'meta')
   141→          Object.assign(draft, nextData)
   142→          const { meta } = data
   143→
   144→          if (data.text) {
   145→            editorRef!.value = data.text
   146→          }
   147→
   148→          if (meta) {
   149→            const created = meta.created || meta.date
   150→            const parsedCreated = created ? dayjs(created) : null
   151→
   152→            if (parsedCreated) {
   153→              draft.created = parsedCreated.toISOString()
   154→            }
   155→
   156→            draft.meta = meta
   157→          }
   158→        }),
   159→      )
   160→    },
   161→  )
   162→
   163→  const { mutateAsync: createPost, isPending: p1 } = useCreatePost()
   164→  const { mutateAsync: updatePost, isPending: p2 } = useUpdatePost()
   165→  const isPending = p1 || p2
   166→
   167→  const navigate = useNavigate()
   168→  return (
   169→    <>
   170→      <div className="shrink grow" />
   171→      <div className="flex grow-0 items-center gap-4">
   172→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   173→          <ImportMarkdownButton onParsedValue={handleParsed} />
   174→          <PreviewButton
   175→            getData={() => ({
   176→              ...getData(),
   177→              id: 'preview',
   178→            })}
   179→          />
   180→        </div>
   181→
   182→        <StyledButton
   183→          isLoading={isPending}
   184→          onClick={() => {
   185→            const currentData = {
   186→              ...getData(),
   187→            }
   188→
   189→            const payload: PostDto & {
   190→              id?: string
   191→            } = {
   192→              ...currentData,
   193→            }
   194→
   195→            // if (
   196→            //   currentData.created === initialData?.created &&
   197→            //   currentData.created
   198→            // ) {
   199→            //   payload.custom_created = new Date(currentData.created)
   200→            // }
   201→
   202→            Reflect.deleteProperty(currentData, 'category')
   203→
   204→            const isCreate = !currentData.id
   205→            const promise = isCreate
   206→              ? createPost(payload).then((res) => {
   207→                  navigate(`/dashboard/posts/edit?id=${res.id}`, {
   208→                    replace: true,
   209→                  })
   210→                  return res
   211→                })
   212→              : updatePost(payload)
   213→
   214→            promise.then((res) => {
   215→              globalThis.dispatchEvent(
   216→                new PublishEvent({
   217→                  ...payload,
   218→                  id: res.id,
   219→                }),
   220→              )
   221→            })
   222→            promise.catch((err) => {
   223→              toast.error(err.message)
   224→            })
   225→          }}
   226→        >
   227→          {initialData ? '保存' : '发布'}
   228→        </StyledButton>
   229→      </div>
   230→    </>
   231→  )
   232→}
   233→
```

```text
    74→  images: [],
    75→  mood: null,
    76→  password: '',
    77→  topicId: null,
    78→  weather: null,
    79→  text: '',
    80→  meta: {},
    81→})
    82→
    83→const EditPage: FC<{
    84→  initialData?: NoteDto
    85→}> = (props) => {
    86→  const [editingData, setEditingData] = useState<NoteDto>(() =>
    87→    props.initialData
    88→      ? cloneDeep(props.initialData)
    89→      : createInitialEditingData(),
    90→  )
    91→  const [forceUpdateKey] = useAutoSaver([editingData, setEditingData])
    92→
    93→  const editingAtom = useMemo(() => atom(editingData), [editingData])
    94→  const created = editingData.created ? new Date(editingData.created) : null
    95→
    96→  const store = useStore()
    97→  useEffect(
    98→    () =>
    99→      store.sub(editingAtom, () => {
   100→        globalThis.dispatchEvent(new WriteEditEvent(store.get(editingAtom)))
   101→      }),
   102→    [editingAtom, store],
   103→  )
   104→
   105→  const isMobile = useIsMobile()
   106→  return (
   107→    <NoteModelDataAtomProvider key={forceUpdateKey} overrideAtom={editingAtom}>
   108→      <BaseWritingProvider atom={editingAtom}>
   109→        <EditorLayer>
   110→          {isMobile ? (
   111→            <div />
   112→          ) : (
   113→            <span>
   114→              {props.initialData ? <>编辑「{editingData.title}」</> : '撰写'}
   115→            </span>
   116→          )}
   117→          <ActionButtonGroup initialData={props.initialData} />
   118→          <Writing
   119→            middleSlot={NoteNid}
   120→            titleLabel={
   121→              created
   122→                ? `记录 ${created.getFullYear()} 年第 ${dayOfYear()} 天`
   123→                : undefined
   124→            }
   125→          />
   126→          <NoteEditorSidebar />
   127→        </EditorLayer>
   128→      </BaseWritingProvider>
   129→    </NoteModelDataAtomProvider>
   130→  )
   131→}
   132→
   133→const ActionButtonGroup = ({ initialData }: { initialData?: NoteDto }) => {
   134→  const getData = useNoteModelGetModelData()
   135→  const setData = useNoteModelSetModelData()
   136→  const editorRef = useEditorRef()
   137→  const handleParsed = useEventCallback(
   138→    (data: {
   139→      title?: string | undefined
   140→      text: string
   141→      meta?: Record<string, any> | undefined
   142→    }): void => {
   143→      setData((prev) =>
   144→        produce(prev, (draft) => {
   145→          const nextData = data
   146→          Reflect.deleteProperty(nextData, 'meta')
   147→          Object.assign(draft, nextData)
   148→          const { meta } = data
   149→
   150→          if (data.text && editorRef) {
   151→            editorRef.value = data.text
   152→          }
   153→
   154→          if (meta) {
   155→            const created = meta.created || meta.date
   156→            const parsedCreated = created ? dayjs(created) : null
   157→
   158→            if (parsedCreated) {
   159→              draft.created = parsedCreated.toISOString()
   160→            }
   161→
   162→            draft.meta = meta
   163→          }
   164→        }),
   165→      )
   166→    },
   167→  )
   168→
   169→  const { mutateAsync: createNote, isPending: p1 } = useCreateNote()
   170→  const { mutateAsync: updateNote, isPending: p2 } = useUpdateNote()
   171→
   172→  const isPending = p1 || p2
   173→  const router = useRouter()
   174→
   175→  return (
   176→    <>
   177→      <div className="shrink grow" />
   178→      <div className="flex grow-0 items-center gap-4">
   179→        <div className="flex gap-2">
   180→          <ImportMarkdownButton onParsedValue={handleParsed} />
   181→          <PreviewButton
   182→            getData={() => ({
   183→              ...getData(),
   184→              id: 'preview',
   185→            })}
   186→          />
   187→        </div>
   188→
   189→        <StyledButton
   190→          isLoading={isPending}
   191→          onClick={() => {
   192→            const currentData = {
   193→              ...getData(),
   194→            }
   195→
   196→            const payload: NoteDto & {
   197→              id?: string
   198→            } = {
   199→              ...currentData,
   200→            }
   201→
   202→            // if (
   203→            //   currentData.created === initialData?.created &&
   204→            //   currentData.created
   205→            // ) {
   206→            //   payload.custom_created = new Date(currentData.created)
   207→            // }
   208→
   209→            Reflect.deleteProperty(currentData, 'category')
   210→
   211→            const isCreate = !currentData.id
   212→            const promise = isCreate
   213→              ? createNote(payload).then((res) => {
   214→                  router.replace(`/dashboard/notes/edit?id=${res.id}`)
   215→
   216→                  return res
   217→                })
   218→              : updateNote(payload)
   219→            promise
   220→              .then((res) => {
   221→                globalThis.dispatchEvent(
   222→                  new PublishEvent({
   223→                    ...payload,
   224→                    id: res.id,
   225→                  }),
   226→                )
   227→              })
   228→              .catch((err) => {
   229→                toast.error(err.message)
   230→              })
   231→          }}
   232→        >
   233→          {initialData ? '保存' : '发布'}
   234→        </StyledButton>
   235→      </div>
   236→    </>
   237→  )
   238→}
   239→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    30→      timer = setTimeout(() => {

    32→      }, timeout)
    33→    }
    34→
    35→    return () => {
    36→      clearTimeout(timer)
    37→    }
    38→  }, [isSecret, secretDate, noteId])

    53→          year: 'numeric',
    54→          day: 'numeric',
    55→          month: 'long',
    56→        }).format(new Date(noteSecret))
    57→      : ''
    58→
    59→    if (isLogged) {

    61→        <>
    62→          <div className="my-6 text-center">
    63→            <p>
    64→              {t('secret_prefix')}
    65→              {dateFormat}
    66→              {t('secret_suffix')}
    67→            </p>
    68→            <p>{t('preview_mode')}</p>
    69→          </div>
    70→          {children}
    71→        </>
    72→      )

    74→    return (
```

变更摘要：

| 文件 | dayjs 用法 | date-fns 替代 |
|------|-----------|--------------|
| `init.ts` | 全局 locale 设置 | 移除（date-fns 按函数传 locale） |
| `DayjsLocaleSync.tsx` | locale 同步组件 | 删除 |
| `layout.tsx` | 引用上述组件 | 移除 import 及使用 |
| `PostOutdate.tsx` | `dayjs().diff(dayjs(time), 'day')` | `differenceInDays(new Date(), new Date(time))` |
| `NoteHideIfSecret.tsx` | `dayjs(x).isAfter(new Date())` | `isAfter(new Date(x), new Date())` |
| `cookie.ts` | `dayjs().add(1,'d').set('h',2).set('m',0)` | `set(addDays(new Date(), 1), {hours:2, minutes:0, ...})` |
| `SidebarDateInputField.tsx` | `dayjs(x).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss')` | `format(new Date(x), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')` |
| `routes/posts/edit` | `dayjs(created).toISOString()` | `new Date(created).toISOString()` |
| `routes/notes/edit` | 同上 | 同上 |
| `next.config.mjs` | 注释中 dayjs 引用 | 改为 date-fns |
| `package.json` | dayjs 依赖 | 移除，加 date-fns |

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-14 06:53:38Z)**_

其余各处亦逐一核之：

- `PostOutdate.tsx`：`differenceInDays` 传入 Invalid Date 返 `NaN`，`NaN > 60` 为 `false`，与 dayjs 行为一致，无碍。
- `NoteHideIfSecret.tsx`：`isAfter` 传入 Invalid Date 返 `false`，与 dayjs 一致，无碍。
- `cookie.ts`：始终以 `new Date()` 为基，无外部输入，无碍。
- `routes/*/edit`：已加 `!isNaN(parsedCreated.getTime())` 防护，已处理。

**2. i18n**

检视所有用法：

- `SidebarDateInputField`：格式 `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss`，纯数字，无需 locale。
- `NoteHideIfSecret`：已用 `Intl.DateTimeFormat` 处理 locale，未依赖 dayjs。
- `PostOutdate`：`differenceInDays` 返数字，无关 locale。
- `cookie.ts`：纯计算，无关 locale。

故现有用法中，**无一处依赖 dayjs 的 locale 格式化**。移除 `DayjsLocaleSync` 无影响。若日后需 locale 格式化，date-fns 按函数传 `{ locale: zhCN }` 即可。

```text
     9→export const RelativeTime: FC<{
    10→  date: string | Date
    11→  displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay?: number
    12→}> = (props) => {
    13→  const { displayAbsoluteTimeAfterDay = 29 } = props
    14→  const { relativeTimeFromNow } = useRelativeTime()
    15→  const format = useFormatter()
    16→
    17→  const formatTime = useCallback(

    21→        Math.floor((dateObj.getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)),

    23→      if (relativeBeforeDay && daysDiff > relativeBeforeDay) {

    26→          month: 'long',
    27→          day: 'numeric',
    28→          weekday: 'long',
    29→        })
    30→      }
    31→      return relativeTimeFromNow(date)

    33→    [format, relativeTimeFromNow],

    46→    }

    48→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./apps/web/src/hooks/common/use-relative-time.ts`

```text
     1→import { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     2→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export const useRelativeTime = () => {
     5→  const t = useTranslations('datetime')
     6→
     7→  const relativeTimeFromNow = useCallback(
     8→    (time: Date | string, current = new Date()) => {
     9→      if (!time) {
    10→        return ''
    11→      }
    12→      time = new Date(time)
    13→      const msPerMinute = 60 * 1000
    14→      const msPerHour = msPerMinute * 60
    15→      const msPerDay = msPerHour * 24
    16→      const msPerMonth = msPerDay * 30
    17→      const msPerYear = msPerDay * 365
    18→
    19→      const elapsed = +current - +time
    20→
    21→      if (elapsed < msPerMinute) {
    22→        const gap = Math.ceil(elapsed / 1000)
    23→        return gap <= 0
    24→          ? t('relative_justNow')
    25→          : t('relative_secondsAgo', { count: gap })
    26→      } else if (elapsed < msPerHour) {
    27→        return t('relative_minutesAgo', {
    28→          count: Math.round(elapsed / msPerMinute),
    29→        })
    30→      } else if (elapsed < msPerDay) {
    31→        return t('relative_hoursAgo', {
    32→          count: Math.round(elapsed / msPerHour),
    33→        })
    34→      } else if (elapsed < msPerMonth) {
    35→        return t('relative_daysAgo', { count: Math.round(elapsed / msPerDay) })
    36→      } else if (elapsed < msPerYear) {
    37→        return t('relative_monthsAgo', {
    38→          count: Math.round(elapsed / msPerMonth),
    39→        })
    40→      } else {
    41→        return t('relative_yearsAgo', {
    42→          count: Math.round(elapsed / msPerYear),
    43→        })
    44→      }
    45→    },
    46→    [t],
    47→  )
    48→
    49→  return { relativeTimeFromNow }
    50→}
    51→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-14 06:55:44Z)**_

相对时间未用 dayjs，无需迁移。

`RelativeTime` 组件用 `next-intl` 的 `useTranslations('datetime')` 做 i18n（如「3 分钟前」「2 天前」），绝对时间用 `useFormatter().dateTime()`（即 `Intl.DateTimeFormat`）。两者皆与 dayjs 无关，迁移不影响。
